title: Excuse me do you have any famous English Eva fan works
display_title: Excuse me do you have any famous English Eva fan works
wikitext:
[]: Excuse me, do you have any famous English Eva fan works?             Quote Post by Vqs88_C3H6O » Sat Feb 22, 2025 10:16 pm I am trying to search for some real high-quality EVA English works and try to translate them into Chinese. I only know English and Chinese (struggling to myself learn Japanese), so I cannot read works in other languages. If you could tell me or give me the original post address (so that I can obtain the consent of the original author to repost), that would be great. Thank you very much!

[]: Re: Excuse me, do you have any famous English Eva fan works?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Feb 22, 2025 10:27 pm Well known fanfiction can be found here: https://tvtropes.org/pmwiki/pmwiki.php/ ... Evangelion A lot of these are old and not necessarily that relevant anymore. Probably the most significant one overall is Evangelion Genocide , which also got a partial light novel adaptation.

Article: Excuse me do you have any famous English Eva fan works
[]: Excuse me, do you have any famous English Eva fan works?             Quote Post by Vqs88_C3H6O » Sat Feb 22, 2025 10:16 pm I am trying to search for some real high-quality EVA English works and try to translate them into Chinese. I only know English and Chinese (struggling to myself learn Japanese), so I cannot read works in other languages. If you could tell me or give me the original post address (so that I can obtain the consent of the original author to repost), that would be great. Thank you very much!

[]: Re: Excuse me, do you have any famous English Eva fan works?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Feb 22, 2025 10:27 pm Well known fanfiction can be found here: https://tvtropes.org/pmwiki/pmwiki.php/ ... Evangelion A lot of these are old and not necessarily that relevant anymore. Probably the most significant one overall is Evangelion Genocide , which also got a partial light novel adaptation.
